'''Bormm Biveedo''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] business associate of [[Drooto Sploonore]]. Much of their business centered on the shipment of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] along the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]].<ref name="BTDF" />
